## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. Link any related issue. -->

## Type
- [ ] New template or brand
- [ ] New style preset
- [ ] Skill or pipeline change
- [ ] Import (PDF or PPTX) change
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist
- [ ] No em-dashes or en-dashes anywhere (use a comma, period, or middot)
- [ ] Generated decks carry no FluidDocs branding (grep the output HTML for `fluiddocs`)
- [ ] A new template loads as a single self-contained HTML file on the 1440x810 canvas
- [ ] A changed skill keeps its SKILL.md credit footer
- [ ] Tested with at least one coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, or similar)
